positive: A stylized, whimsical scene featuring a group of anthropomorphic forest animals—a fox, an owl, and a rabbit—in a joyful, celebratory picnic. The style should be a modern vector illustration with bold, flat colors, crisp lines, and minimal shading (cel-shaded look). The composition should be centered, utilizing negative space effectively for apparel printing. The animals are depicted interacting with woodland elements like oversized toadstools, hanging ivy, and baskets of glowing berries. The overall mood is joyful and nostalgic. High contrast, clean silhouettes, graphic design aesthetic. Vibrant palette of forest greens, autumnal oranges, deep blues, and pops of warm yellow. Ideal for T-shirt printing.
negative: blurry, amateur, text, watermark, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, noise, gradient, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, dirt, grunge
